home.hero_sub: We help brands become part of Amsterdam's daily journey through high-impact advertising that moves throughout the city.
home.reach_text: We bring together two complementary advertising solutions designed to maximize your brand's visibility across Amsterdam.
home.card1_title: Be seen across Amsterdam, every day.
home.card1_text: As taxis move through the city, your brand gains continuous exposure in the places where people live, work, shop, and socialise.
home.card2_title: Reach people when they are truly paying attention.
home.card2_text: Unlike crowded advertising channels, taxi passengers have time to focus on their surroundings during the journey. This creates a unique opportunity for your brand to deliver messages in a more engaging and memorable environment.
home.card3_text: Digital screens create engagement during the journey, while branded vehicles generate visibility across the city. Combined, they deliver a stronger and more memorable advertising experience.
home.network_text1:
Unlike nationwide advertising networks, AdsCabs focuses exclusively on Amsterdam. This local-first approach enables us to provide targeted coverage, trusted partnerships, and advertising solutions tailored to the city's dynamic environment.
Whether your audience is commuting to Zuidas, visiting Museumplein, attending events at RAI Amsterdam, or exploring the city centre, AdsCabs helps your brand stay visible where it matters most.
home.network_text2: Focused on one city. Connected to millions of moments.
home.cta_h2: Ready to put your brand in motion?
home.cta_text: Let's create an advertising campaign that travels with Amsterdam.

about.hero_sub: AdsCabs was not built in a boardroom. It was built by people who spent years inside the taxi and transport industry , and saw an opportunity that everyone else was driving past.
about.story_h2: Born in Amsterdam, traveling across the Netherlands
about.story_p1: What started with a handful of screens in Amsterdam cabs grew into a national network that gives brands a platform at the moment attention is highest — on the move.
about.story_p2: We believe the best ad doesn't interrupt, but fits the moment. That's why AdsCabs combines premium placement with smart technology and transparent data.
about.values_sub: Three principles that guide every campaign and partnership.
about.value1_text: Sharp screens, flawless technology and careful placement — your brand deserves nothing less.
about.value2_text: Clear data and honest reporting. You always know where, when and how often your brand is seen.
about.value3_text: Smart targeting and real-time technology keep our network — and your campaign — one step ahead.
about.mission_text: Every day, millions of people are on the move. We turn those moments into valuable touchpoints — relevant for the traveler, powerful for the brand.
about.tick1: The largest digital in-vehicle ad network in the Netherlands
about.tick2: Responsible and non-intrusive for the traveler
about.team_sub: A compact team of media, tech and creative specialists with one goal: making your brand stand out on the road.
about.cta_h2: Want to know what we can do for you?
about.cta_text: Let's get acquainted. We'd love to tell you more about our network and possibilities.
about.story_left_h2: From the industry, for the industry
about.story_left_p1: The founders of AdsCabs come from a background in aviation, transport logistics, and mobility operations. We have managed fleets, coordinated passenger flows, and solved problems that only make sense when you've stood on the ground watching them happen.
about.story_left_p2: That experience taught us one thing clearly: the taxi is one of the most underused media surfaces in the city. Thousands of vehicles. Millions of rides. A captive audience with nowhere to go and nothing to do but pay attention.
about.story_left_p3: So we built AdsCabs ,  a network designed from the inside out, by people who understand both the vehicle and the passenger sitting in it.
about.story_right_p1: Most advertising competes for attention. AdsCabs earns it. Our formats — in-cabin tablet screens and full exterior taxi wraps, put brands exactly where audiences already are, without interrupting anything.
about.story_right_p2: We believe advertising works best when it fits naturally into the moment. A passenger on their way to Schiphol. A tourist exploring Amsterdam for the first time. A professional heading to their next meeting. These are real people, in real places, ready to receive a real message.
about.pull_quote: "We didn't invent taxi advertising. We reinvented what it could be measurable, targeted, and built for the brands that want more than just visibility."
about.growth_intro: We started where the demand is highest  "Amsterdam". The city with the busiest taxi corridors, the highest tourist density, and the most premium passenger profile in the Netherlands. Every route, every driver, every screen in our network was chosen with one goal: maximum impact for every advertiser.
about.tl1_text: First taxis on the road, first screens activated. Focus on the Schiphol corridor and city center — the highest-traffic routes in the Netherlands.
about.tl2_text: Active tablet screens and wrapped taxis running brand campaigns across Amsterdam. Real reporting. Real reach. Real results for early partners.
about.tl3_text: The Randstad is the next step. A nationwide network is the destination. Brands that join now grow with us — and get the best rates in the process.
about.ams_text: Our home base and launch city. From the canals to city centel, from the Zuidas to the Jordaan — AdsCabs taxis partners are moving through every corner of the city, carrying your brand with them.
about.card1_text: Built by people from transport industry,  we understand the vehicle, the driver, and the passenger.
about.card2_text: Every campaign comes with real data : impressions, routes, reach. No guessing, no vague metrics.
about.card3_text: City-level targeting means your campaign runs where it matters ,  not just somewhere in the Netherlands.
about.card4_text: Early partners grow with us,  and earn the best placements, rates, and attention as we scale.

advertising.hero_sub: Reach millions of travelers at eye level, in a premium moment of full attention. Digital screens in taxis across the Netherlands.
advertising.formats_text: From subtle presence to a full brand experience — each format is fully digital, measurable and plannable by target group and city.
advertising.format1_text: Full-motion video on the headrest screen, at eye level during the entire ride. Maximum impact and brand recall.
advertising.format2_text: A fixed brand banner next to the video — with logo, QR code or call to action. Reinforces your message and drives conversions.
advertising.format3_text: The entire screen, exclusively for your brand. Dominate a city, event or campaign period with 100% share of screen.
advertising.wrap_text: Full taxi wraps transform every cab into a moving billboard, building brand awareness across Amsterdam's streets — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
advertising.wrap_tick1: Full exterior wrap or partial branding — you decide the coverage
advertising.wrap_tick2: Continuous exposure across Amsterdam's busiest routes
advertising.wrap_tick3: High-visibility format — seen by pedestrians, cyclists and drivers
advertising.wrap_tick4: Premium print quality with durable, weather-resistant materials
advertising.why_text: In the taxi, your brand is not one of many stimuli — it's the screen in a quiet, premium environment. No scrolling, no clicking away.
advertising.why_tick1: 2.5× longer view time than average out-of-home media
advertising.why_tick2: Relevant audience: travelers, tourists and business guests
advertising.why_tick3: Targeting by city, time slot and area
advertising.why_tick4: Real-time reporting on reach and impressions
advertising.process_text: In four clear steps, your campaign goes live in the largest taxi network in the Netherlands.
advertising.step1_text: We determine target audience, cities and campaign goals together based on your brand.
advertising.step2_text: Our studio delivers or optimizes video and banner, ready for the screen.
advertising.step3_text: Your campaign is rolled out across selected taxis and time slots.
advertising.step4_text: Real-time insight into reach, impressions and results — transparent and measurable.
advertising.cta_text: Contact us and we'll build your campaign together.

partners.hero_sub: From leading brands to taxi operators and media agencies — our network grows through strong partnerships across the Netherlands.
partners.types_text: Each with their own role in the network — and a shared goal: the right message at the right moment, on the road.
partners.type1_text: Brands that want to reach their audience in a premium, attentive environment — nationally or per city.
partners.type2_text: Drivers and fleets that earn from every screen — without hassle, with a fixed monthly fee.
partners.type3_text: Agencies that seamlessly add taxi media to their OOH mix, with transparent data and easy planning.
partners.brands_text: A selection of brands that trust our network with their campaigns.
partners.cta_h2: Want to be part of our network?
partners.cta_text: Whether you are an advertiser, taxi operator or media agency — we'd love to get in touch.

contact.hero_sub: Planning a campaign, registering your fleet or just brainstorming about the possibilities? We'd love to hear from you.
